'''''Red Harvest''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Starfleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Imperial Remnant]].

==History==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], it was part of a [[Hammer Group|battle group]] that followed [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] to the [[Battle of Garqi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
